title: Challenge: Required Element
description: Generates something that must appear somewhere in the piece.
entries: a broken clock
an unkept promise
the smell of rain on hot stone
a locked drawer
a name spoken only once
a knock no one answers
a stain that will not come out
a photograph with someone cut out of it
a key that fits nothing in the house
a meal no one eats
an animal that appears at the wrong moment
a lie told to a child for their own good
a debt repaid too late
a song sung off-key
a light left on in an empty room
a scar with two different stories
a letter opened by the wrong person
a door that should have been locked
a gift that means the opposite of kindness
a stranger who knows too much
a train leaving without someone on it
an apology that arrives disguised as an insult
the last cigarette in the pack
a bruise no one asks about
a coin flipped to decide something serious
a window that will not close
a set of footprints leading the wrong way
an old coat with something sewn into the lining
a phone number that no longer connects
a garden left to grow wild on purpose
